src/components/dashboard/geo-score-trend.description: GEO Score Trend component uses useUnifiedScore hook from useDashboard.ts, which calls /api/analytics/unified-score API. The component has proper loading states (Loader2 spinner), empty states, and transforms API response to chart data format. The main dashboard page uses ScoreTrend component (unified SEO+GEO+AEO) instead of GeoScoreTrend (GEO-only).
